message:
perf(core): add #[inline] to animation and gesture hot-path accessors (bd-6visl)

Add #[inline] to frequently-called methods:
- animation/mod.rs: Fade::raw_progress, Pulse::phase, Parallel::first/second,
  Delayed::has_started/inner
- animation/timeline.rs: Timeline::progress
- animation/group.rs: AnimationGroup::len/is_empty/all_complete/overall_progress/get/get_at
- animation/callbacks.rs: Callbacks::inner/inner_mut/pending_event_count
- gesture.rs: GestureRecognizer::process/check_long_press

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
